title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
author: openai-blog
raw_description: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
summary: 研究人员利用OpenAI推理模型辅助诊断罕见儿童遗传病，在先前未解病例中识别出18个新诊断，展示了AI在医疗诊断中的潜力。
analysis_note: 有价值的AI应用研究，直接解决临床难题，但技术细节未详述，创新性一般。
